name: chrome-genie-client
description: ChromeGenie Client for browser control automation

scripts.build:frontend:dev: cd frontend && npm run build && cd .. && rm -rf resources && cp -r frontend/out resources && node scripts/setup-resources.js && rm -rf frontend/out
scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend && npm run build && cd .. && rm -rf resources && cp -r frontend/out resources && node scripts/setup-resources.js && rm -rf frontend/out
scripts.build:deb: npm run build && bash scripts/build-deb.sh || echo 'Skipped .deb'
scripts.build:appimage: npm run build && bash scripts/build-appimage.sh || echo 'Skipped AppImage'
scripts.build:linux: npm run build:deb && npm run build:appimage
scripts.build:macos: npm run build && bash scripts/build-macos-dmg.sh || echo 'Skipped macOS DMG'
scripts.build:windows: npm run build && bash scripts/build-windows-installer.sh || echo 'Skipped Windows ZIP'
scripts.build:all: npm run build && (bash scripts/build-macos-dmg.sh || true) && (bash scripts/build-windows-installer.sh || true) && (bash scripts/build-deb.sh || true) && (bash scripts/build-appimage.sh || true)
